title: Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Misconfigured Cloud Storage
description: Due to the unknown cloud environment configuration, there's a risk of sensitive data being exposed through misconfigured cloud storage buckets or APIs.  Lack of details about security controls makes this a high-priority concern.
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to cloud storage buckets or APIs due to weak access controls, default configurations, or vulnerabilities in the cloud infrastructure.
mitigations: Implement strict access controls for all cloud storage buckets and APIs.
Regularly scan cloud storage for misconfigurations and vulnerabilities.
Utilize encryption to protect sensitive data at rest and in transit.
